svg.title: VEKTRON V — Canonical Mark (v9 Silhouette Lock, Vektron Violet)
svg.desc: VEKTRON Technologies, LLC — Canonical V Mark Pure silhouette. One color. No bevel, no halo, no texture. Geometry: locked v16 (12-point anchor set on 1000-unit viewBox). Brand color: Vektron Violet #53268E (LOCKED — proprietary brand color, CEO decree 2026-05-28).
